generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane system representing the base frame for mounting all components."
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for horizontal movement of the crane cart (TMC4671-Eval controller)."
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor responsible for vertical hoisting movement of the crane (TMC4671-Eval controller)."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet used to pick up and release small pucks representing containers at the end of the hoist."
]

instance CranePowerSupply : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Power Supply Unit (PSU) providing electrical power to all electronic components of the crane system."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures swinging motion of the hoist using angular displacement data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane operations using anemometer technology."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Custom KiCad-designed Arduino shield collecting data from SwingAngleEncoder and WindSpeedAnemometer."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance ArduinoSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneInterfaceController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion 360 representing the physical structure of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory generation and simulation of crane movements."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical crane state data including position, speed, and swinging motion."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental data including wind speed affecting crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swinging motion measured by the SwingAngleEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated and executed trajectory data for crane movements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryGenerationService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based control application for crane operations, logging, and HMI interactions."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneInterfaceController, LoggingApplication, HMIService
]

instance DockerContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker and Docker Compose for containerizing database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services."
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler, GrafanaEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for logging crane state, environmental, and trajectory data."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization dashboard for real-time and historical crane monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating inter-service communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneInterfaceController, LoggingApplication, TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino platform for sensor data collection and control of electromagnet."
    DTDFVocab:enables ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for CAD modeling of the physical crane structure."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneCADModel
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool (Capella) for creating Arcadia models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemDesignService
]

// C6: Services
instance CraneInterfaceController : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers and transmitting sensor data to digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonControlEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state (position, speed, swinging motion) to TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonControlEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model to minimize swinging motion."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryData
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneKinematicModel, PythonControlEnabler
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane behavior and controller performance for testing and validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneKinematicModel, PythonControlEnabler
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories with simulations to detect deviations and notify operators."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryData, CraneStateData, PythonControlEnabler
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies system faults through continuous validation and time-series classification."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables SwingAngleData, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs crane state data to TimescaleDB for analysis and validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneStateData, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes real-time and historical data via Grafana dashboard for monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance HMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-Machine Interface for operator interaction and parameter adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonControlEnabler
]

instance SystemDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creates and maintains Arcadia models for Model-Based Systems Engineering."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemDesignInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables CapellaEnabler
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides insights into optimal movement paths to minimize swinging motion."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies system faults through continuous validation and time-series classification."
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state and historical trends via Grafana dashboard."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to logged crane state data for analysis and validation."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of crane behavior and controller performance."
]

instance SystemDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Arcadia models representing the system architecture and components."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from comparing executed trajectories with simulations."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts control parameters based on validation results or operator input."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Physical Environment
instance PhysicalCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical lab-scale gantry crane system representing harbor crane operations."
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor,
               CraneElectromagnet, CranePowerSupply, ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin infrastructure hosting all services and models."
    base:contains TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler,
               TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService,
               ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService,
               HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService,
               HMIService, SystemDesignService
]

// C5: Components
instance CraneInterfaceControllerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical-to-virtual interface connecting crane controllers to digital twin services."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance LoggingApplicationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service responsible for continuous state logging to TimescaleDB."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal trajectories using kinematic models."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance SimulationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service simulating crane behavior for validation and testing."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ValidationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service comparing physical execution with digital simulations."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance FaultDetectionComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Service identifying system faults through time-series analysis."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Data and commands flow from the digital twin to the physical system through:
  - **Control Application**: A Python application that uses the crane interface to send control commands (e.g., movement trajectories) to the physical crane.
  - **Trajectory Generator Service**: Generates optimal movement trajectories for the crane, which are then executed by the physical crane.
  - **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**: Allows operators to configure and control the crane, with commands relayed to the physical system via the Control Application."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in real-time, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual systems. Key time-scale considerations include:
  - **Real-time data logging**: Crane state data is logged continuously.
  - **Continuous validation**: Executed trajectories are compared with simulations in real-time to ensure accuracy and detect faults.
  - **Trajectory execution**: Movement commands are generated and executed in near real-time to maintain synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin system is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Physical System**: Consists of the gantry crane, its controllers, and sensors.
  - **Digital System**: Comprises six containers (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, and MQTT broker) that interact via MQTT and shared data storage.
  - **Deployment**: All digital twin components (except the physical crane) are deployed on a single personal computer, with containerization (Docker) used for the database, MQTT broker, and dashboard.
  - **Interaction Flow**:
    - Physical sensors → Arduino → Physical Crane Interface → Digital Twin Services (logging, validation, etc.).
    - Digital Twin Services → Control Application → Physical Crane (via crane interface)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the following lifecycle phases of its physical counterpart:
  - **As Operated**: The digital twin is primarily focused on the operational phase, where it continuously validates and optimizes the crane’s performance.
  - **As Designed (Ideal)**: CAD models and kinematic models represent the crane as designed, but the twin is not explicitly used for manufacturing or design validation.
  The twin is used for real-time monitoring, control, and fault detection during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Continuous Validation**: The Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectories with simulations to detect deviations and ensure accuracy.
  - **Simulation Service**: Provides a high-fidelity model of the crane’s behavior, including confidence bounds for trajectory predictions.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The system uses distance metrics to quantify deviations between physical and simulated trajectories.
  - **Verification and Validation**:
    - Trajectory simulations are validated against real-world execution.
    - Fault detection techniques (e.g., time-series classification) are applied to improve model accuracy.
  - **Error Handling**: Operators are notified via the dashboard if validation thresholds are breached."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and digital twin includes:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - MQTT (via Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication.
    - Python-based interfaces for direct communication between the physical crane and digital twin services.
  - **Architecture**:
    - Centralized deployment on a single personal computer.
    - Containerized services (Docker) for the database, MQTT broker, and dashboard.
    - Direct wiring of Arduino to the crane’s sensors and actuators."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Local Deployment**: All components (except the physical crane) run on a single personal computer.
  - **Containerization**: Database, MQTT broker, and dashboard are containerized using Docker, with a `docker-compose.yml` file for easy setup.
  - **Open-Source Tools**: Uses open-source software (TimescaleDB, Grafana, Eclipse Mosquitto) for flexibility and reproducibility.
  - **Hardware Requirements**: Minimal hardware requirements (e.g., Raspberry Pi or similar single-board computer could theoretically host the system)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited but includes:
  - **External Data Sources**: Potential integration with external systems (e.g., harbor management systems) is not explicitly described but could be extended for teaching purposes (e.g., container identification system).
  - **Interoperability**: The use of open standards (MQTT, Docker, Python) facilitates integration with other systems, though no specific integrations are documented."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy considerations are not explicitly addressed in the document. However:
  - The exemplar is published under the MIT license, implying open access to data and code.
  - No mention of data encryption, access control, or compliance with privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards and practices:
  - **Open-Source Tools**: Uses widely adopted open-source technologies (Python, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, MQTT).
  - **Modeling Standards**: CAD models are created in Autodesk Fusion 360, and system models are developed using Capella (for Model-Based Systems Engineering).
  - **No Proprietary Frameworks**: Avoids commercial digital twin frameworks, opting for an ad-hoc approach with open-source tools."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are not explicitly detailed, but the following can be inferred:
  - **Local Deployment**: The system is deployed locally, reducing exposure to remote attacks.
  - **Fault Detection**: Continuous validation and fault detection mechanisms help ensure safe operation.
  - **No Remote Execution**: The digital twin does not explicitly describe remote execution of operations on the physical system, which could pose safety risks if implemented.
  - **Safety Measures**: The use of validation and simulation services mitigates risks by ensuring commands are safe before execution.
  - **No Explicit Cybersecurity**: No mention of cybersecurity protocols (e.g., authentication, encryption) for data transmission or system access."
]
